claim: Cascaded systems (speech-to-text, LLM, text-to-speech) have inherently high latency—the entire stack must complete in ~200ms for natural conversation, but TTS alone is 200+ms
actionable: For human-like latency in voice agents, consider full-duplex speech-to-speech models or add artificial fillers while waiting for tool results
source_title: Voice AI: when is the "Her" moment?

claim: Tool calls in voice agents add 500ms to 4s latency, which is the actual bottleneck—far exceeding TTS latency gains
actionable: When building voice agents with tool use, mitigate latency by having the LLM generate filler speech while waiting for tool results
source_title: Voice AI: when is the "Her" moment?

claim: Half-duplex models (listen XOR speak) cannot handle backchannel signals like 'mhm' or speech overlap that humans naturally produce
actionable: Choose full-duplex models (like Moshi) if your use case requires natural conversational overlap and backchanneling
source_title: Voice AI: when is the "Her" moment?

claim: Moshi is the only full-duplex voice model that handles simultaneous speech, but it lacks agent reasoning, tool use, and paralinguistic understanding
actionable: If you need full-duplex with agent reasoning, build a hybrid that uses Moshi for naturalness but pairs it with an LLM for intelligence
source_title: Voice AI: when is the "Her" moment?

claim: Voice cloning requires only 10 seconds of audio to analyze tone, pitch, accent, and quirks for reproduction
actionable: Use voice cloning with minimal audio samples to create consistent agent personas
source_title: Voice AI: when is the "Her" moment?

claim: Cascaded systems (like all current voice agents except Moshi) lose paralinguistic information (tone, hesitation, emotion) when transcribing to text
actionable: For voice agents requiring emotion understanding, use speech-to-speech models that preserve paralinguistic cues
source_title: Voice AI: when is the "Her" moment?

claim: Gradium Phonon is an on-device CPU-based TTS model (<100M parameters) enabling voice applications without API costs
actionable: Use on-device TTS for mobile voice apps to avoid API billing and ensure privacy
source_title: Voice AI: when is the "Her" moment?
